extras.title: considerate, considerable
extras.content: It's very considerate of you to send me a Christmas gift at considerable expense every year. 你每年都花很多钱给我买圣诞礼物，真是考虑周到。
该词可跟名词或 that 和 wh-词引导的名词性从句。
in consideration of 考虑到;作为对…的报酬 // take into consideration 考虑到

senses.example: Can you distinguish those distant objects?
senses.example_zh: 你能看清远处的那些物体吗？

senses.example: He distinguished himself in the examination.

senses.def_en: large in size, amount, or quantity
senses.example: I have given considerable thought to the matter.
senses.example_zh: 这件事我已经考虑得相当充分了。

senses.def_en: showing regard for the needs or feelings of others
senses.example: It is considerate of you to send me a postcard.
senses.example_zh: 寄给我明信片，你真是细心周到。

senses.example: You did quite well in your exams, considering how little you studied.
senses.example_zh: 就你平时这么少学习来说，你已考得不错了。

senses.example: I leave it entirely to your kind consideration.
Jeff never shows any consideration for his mother's feelings.
senses.example_zh: 杰夫从来不体谅他母亲的感受。

senses.def_en: knowing that sth. (such as a situation, problem) exists
senses.example: Most people are aware of the risk when they invest in stocks and shares.
senses.example_zh: 大多数人在投资证券的时候是意识到风险的。

senses.def_zh: aware of sth.(such as a fact or feeling)意识到的
senses.example: The greatest of faults is to be conscious of none.
senses.example_zh: 最严重的缺点是意识不到自己的缺点。

senses.def_en: awake and able to understand what is happening around you
senses.example: The driver was still conscious when the ambulance reached the scene of the accident.
senses.example_zh: 当救护车赶到事故现场时，司机仍然神志清醒。

senses.example: I had to make a conscious effort not to be rude to her.
senses.example_zh: 我得刻意约束自己不要对她粗鲁。

derivatives: unconscious a. 失去知觉的;无意地说出或做出的

entries.mnemonic: off(离开)+end(最后)→感情受到“冒犯”，最后离开了

senses.def_en: to cause displeasure, anger, or wounded feelings in
senses.example: Don't be offended. I am just fooling around.
senses.example_zh: 别恼火，我只是在开玩笑。

senses.def_en: to be displeasing or disagreeable to
senses.example: Some music offends rather than pleases the ear.
senses.example_zh: 有些音乐不是悦耳，而是刺耳。

senses.def_en: to be against what people believe is morally right
senses.example: These comments offend against people's religious beliefs.
senses.example_zh: 这些评论有悖于人们的宗教信仰。

derivatives: offender n. 冒犯者,犯罪者

senses.def_en: to cause sb. to feel slightly angry
senses.example: What annoys me is the way he won't even listen to other people's suggestions. // The mosquitoes annoyed me so much that I couldn't sleep.
senses.example_zh: 让我恼火的是他那不肯听别人建议的样子。// 蚊子搅得我无法入睡。
